title: Electromechanics
description: An addition to the existing Redstone ecosystem mechanically and electrically
body:
Electromechanics is another Redstone mod with the idea based on the name chosen with both electrical and mechanical aspects to be expanded upon within this mod.

### Features
- **Colored Redstone Variants**: Allows for connection to either Redstone and its colored variant allowing for closer redstone wires for different signals.
- **Colored Slime Variants**: Similar in design to existing slime blocks allowing for more variants when designing moving parts within your machine
  - Comes with a slime slab variant with special properties allowing for slimmer moving parts.
- **Expanded Redstone Gates**: Addition of new gates allowing for basic boolean logic or even more complex operations like multiply, modules, timer, or switching output direction.
  - Click the gate to either toggle different mods or invert the output!
- **Expanded Observer Variants**: These variants include the ability to watch for NBT data changes in blocks or look for neighboring block updates.

### Compatibility
Supports Optimizations found within Lithium for all colored redstone variants
